废土最大基地的统治者阮响穿越了，穿越成了古代逃荒大军中的一员。
寻找水源、灌溉土地、修建滤水池、制砖造窑、扫盲榨油……
为了更好的活下去，阮响吸纳一切可以吸纳的人手。
直到她发现——
朝廷式微，群臣畏战，北有匈奴烧杀抢掠，南有蛮夷趁机作乱，连贵族皇室的女眷都要被送给匈奴抵债。
这是属于她的时代。
若败，一死而已，若胜，则女主天下。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b47adf2c9eaf35aa3b266d0b6c5daa9","author":"竹野","author_id":"","book_id":"7217721089957301251","book_name":"我在废土满级后，穿越荒年当女帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#883828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1139,"name":"古风世情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1139&name=古风世情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":86,"name":"女强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=86&name=女强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7217727007105221154","read_count":"15411","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1731450"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"799","tags":"古风世情,古代言情,穿越,女强,基建,古言权谋","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oa786268727dfb6ab6f4b9740102d397c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438117&x-signature=zK5b3E3P9lnoI2ES3EDlw7XG3S4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1416636390445976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.0421729e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323162157874C9CD71E23211C70DB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwa rded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15048,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":33811},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7506128265301328664","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"而且最牛的是书里的每一个小人物都是有血有肉有思想的，不像别的小说虽然现在不流行把女配或者女性角色都写成坏人了，但是又走向了另一个极端好像所有女性角色都是圣人一般没有自己的私心，对女性的道德要求抬的比男性还高。这本书就不会这样，而是真正做到了把女人当人看，女人也是人，有好的也有坏的，有自己的思想有私心有欲望，也会想要权利也有可能为权利作斗争也有可能被权利腐化，我认为这才是真正的女强文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747660582,"group_id":"7217721089957301251","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3415516764967704"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7217721089957301251","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"789"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":94306,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":34},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7506131574124151576","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，和我过往看过的女强文基建文都不同，女主从头到尾都没有称帝，她想要的是创建一个大同天下，也就是社会主义国家，更注重的是对百姓们思想上的改革，不是简简单单讲女主如何打天下，而是讲解封建王朝为什么会这样，为什么会有自上而下的剥削，为什么会有男人对女人的剥削，看完感觉不是普通小说而是看了本政治书，很多从前想不通的事在这本书里都找到了答案，作者实在太厉害了，这书应该在9.8以上"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747660247,"group_id":"7217721089957301251","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3xkqoKFA9tV2/P2FySfODRCA9CFExSVgr5YmkuBMj8f","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0fd06d624df141eca73079824ce4e7d2~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9
